summary: AI V1 Stabilization Testing Complete - All stabilization features verified. Backend: 17/17 tests pass (100%). Frontend: 100% success. The key fix (Coach Williams briefing intermittent timeout) is resolved - tested 3 times via API, all successful in 5-6s. Timeout/retry mechanism (45s backend + 50s frontend) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _send_with_retry in ai.py correctly implements 45s asyncio.wait_for timeout with 1 retry
All 4 AI endpoints in intelligence.py properly catch RuntimeError and return 503
Frontend AiBriefing.js has proper 50s axios timeout and differentiated error handling (timeout, 503, 400, 403, 401)
Frontend Try Again button is properly rendered in error state with correct data-testid='ai-retry-btn'
RecommendationBuilder.js Draft with AI button correctly disabled when no athlete/school selected
seed_data_creation: None - used existing athletes, events, and notes
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI V1 Stabilization verified. All 4 AI endpoints work reliably: (1) POST /api/ai/program-narrative, (2) POST /api/ai/briefing, (3) POST /api/ai/event-recap/{event_id}, (4) POST /api/ai/advocacy-draft/{athlete_id}/{school_id}. The intermittent Coach Williams timeout is RESOLVED by 45s backend timeout + 1 retry + 50s frontend timeout. Event_0 (Winter Showcase) has 9 notes for recap testing.
